productName: Ooowee - JUICED 1G Hydrocarbon Concentrate - Orange Sunrise - Mr. Bad - 1g
description: A workhorse hybrid dab: Orange Sunrise run through a closed-loop butane extraction and finished to a smooth, high-potency concentrate. Smooth and high-potency, with notes of pineapple, orange, and butter, leading into a versatile, anytime balance.
